Title: Increases penalties for reckless operation and unauthorized modification of electric personal mobility devices
Summary: Provides a tiered penalty structure for the reckless operation of electric personal mobility devices including fines, confiscation of the device and potential misdemeanor charges; provides penalties for the illegal modification of electric personal mobility devices.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to increasing penalties for reckless operation and unauthorized modification of electric personal mobility devices
